item.title: Choking Hazards - Sunday Evening Service - Mar 17th, 2024
item.description:
Discover the unexpected hazards that can stifle our spiritual gifts in this thought-provoking sermon. Learn how fears, the cares of this world, and the lure of money can prevent us from fulfilling our God-given potential. Drawing on Biblical stories from the Israelites to the Apostles, and paralleled with modern-day analogies, this message invites us to reflect on our own spiritual journeys. Are we fully utilizing our gifts, or are we letting fears, cares, and financial concerns choke our spiritual growth? Join us as we explore ways to overcome these barriers and step into the abundant life God has for each of us. Perfect for anyone looking to deepen their faith and activate their spiritual gifts amidst life's challenges.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: How To Pray Successfully - Sunday Morning Service - Mar 17th, 2024
item.description:
Dive into the essence of successful prayer with our latest sermon, exploring the depth of communication with God. Uncover the biblical foundations of prayer through humor, poignant stories, and a thorough examination of scripture. From the Lord's Prayer to the faith of a mustard seed, learn how to enhance your prayer life in a manner that aligns with God's will. Whether you're seeking guidance on how to pray, understanding the power of prayer, or simply looking to deepen your faith, this sermon offers valuable insights for believers at every stage of their spiritual journey. Join us as we unravel the mysteries of praying successfully, supported by the teachings of Jesus and the wisdom of the scriptures. Let's grow together in our understanding and practice of this profound spiritual discipline.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Finding My Purpose In God’s Purpose - Sunday Evening Service - Mar 10th, 2024
item.description:
Through the wisdom of Romans 8:28-29 and engaging anecdotes, discover the joy and fulfillment in embracing God's call, love, and predestination. Unveil the steps towards being conformed to the image of Christ and how this shapes our ultimate joy and purpose in life. Whether you're seeking direction, affirmation, or a deeper understanding of your spiritual journey, this message offers valuable insights into finding your unique place in God's grand narrative.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: The True Teachings of Christ in Practice - Sunday Morning Service - Mar 10th, 2024
item.description:
Discover how Christ's emphasis on practice over theory guides us towards making small, meaningful adjustments in our lives. Inspired by the real-life story of Play-Doh's invention, this sermon beautifully illustrates how we're all just one small adjustment away from aligning our lives more closely with Christ's teachings. From being misjudged to misguided, and misbehaving, learn how to see through Christ's eyes and become His apprentice in the way of love, kindness, and righteousness. Whether you're looking to deepen your faith or find practical ways to live out Christ's teachings every day, this sermon offers wisdom and insight for everyone.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Finding My Purpose In God’s Thoughts - Sunday Evening Service - Mar 3rd, 2024
item.description:
Dive into the heart of finding your purpose through God's lens with our latest sermon, "Finding My Purpose In God’s Thoughts." Unpack the profound truths hidden within Jeremiah 29:11-14, as we explore how God's plans, peace, and purpose shape our lives. Through engaging stories, biblical insights, and a touch of humor, this message invites you on a journey to deeper understanding and fulfillment. Discover how aligning with God's thoughts can transform your perspective on life's purpose. Join us for an enlightening exploration of finding true meaning and direction in the divine plans God has for each of us.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Saul’s Path to Being Rejected and Replaced - Sunday Morning Service - Mar 3rd, 2024
item.description:
Explore the riveting story of King Saul's rise and fall in "Saul’s Path to Being Rejected and Replaced". This sermon delves into the biblical narrative of 1 Samuel, offering profound insights into the dangers of disobedience, the deceitfulness of appearances, and the devastating consequences of losing God's presence. Through Saul's journey, learn the critical importance of spiritual integrity and the hope of redemption through obedience to God. Join us as we uncover the lessons Saul's story holds for personal growth and spiritual renewal.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Keeping Worship Special - Sunday Evening Service - Feb 18th, 2024
item.description:
Explore the sacredness of worship in 'Keeping Worship Special,' a sermon that delves into the biblical significance of worship as a unique and holy experience. Through the metaphor of smell and a touching modern-day story, this message invites us to reflect on how we approach worship, encouraging us to create a special, sensory, and sacred space that honors God. Discover how ancient practices can guide our worship today, making it a pleasing aroma to the Lord. This sermon reminds us of the importance of respecting and cherishing our worship experiences, drawing closer to God with every breath.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: One Receives The Prize! - Sunday Morning Service - Feb 25th, 2024
item.description:
Explore the depths of your purpose with 'One Receives The Prize!' – a compelling journey through scripture that challenges us to live a life glorifying God. Discover the essential elements of realization, restraint, resolve, and rules through a diverse array of biblical passages. This sermon will guide you towards understanding your life's ultimate goal: to honor God in all you do. Whether you're seeking direction or inspiration to elevate your spiritual journey, this message offers valuable insights into achieving a purpose-driven life that aligns with God's glory. Join us as we delve into a transformative exploration of faith, purpose, and the pursuit of an imperishable crown.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears 3 - Sunday Evening Service - Feb 18th, 2024
item.description:
Welcome to the third part of our transformative sermon series, "Coping with Our Fears," where we explore the dynamic role of faith in addressing the anxieties that challenge us daily. In this segment, we delve into the power of scripture, drawing from Philippians 4:6-7 and other pivotal verses, to present humor-filled, relatable narratives alongside deep spiritual insights. Learn about the four pillars of coping with anxiety through faith: prayer, peace, protection, and the power of God. We dissect common fears with practical examples—ranging from humorous hypotheticals to everyday worries—showcasing how these concerns often hold less substance than we might think.
This sermon offers an in-depth look at the unnecessary nature of most anxieties and provides biblical strategies for shifting our focus from fear to faith. Highlighting the significance of prayer, the peace that comes from trusting God, the protection offered by faith, and the strength found in Christ, we're guided on how to transform our approach to life's uncertainties.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Excessive Church of Christ Fears - Sunday Morning Service - Feb 18th, 2024
item.description:
Dive into an enlightening journey as we explore "Excessive Church of Christ Fears" in our latest sermon. Discover how common fears among believers, from financial loss to the dread of judgment day, can be overcome through faith, scriptural wisdom, and the transformative power of God's love. With engaging anecdotes, historical insights, and a deep dive into the Scriptures, this sermon offers a comforting perspective on facing our fears with courage and trust in the Lord. Join us for a faith-affirming session that promises to uplift and inspire.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears 2 - Sunday Evening Service - Feb 11th, 2024
item.description:
Discover how scriptures like Isaiah 41:10 and 2 Timothy 1:7 guide us towards a sound mind, love, and power over fear. From personal anecdotes to divine truths, learn how faith in God's presence, godliness, helpfulness, and righteousness can transform fear into faithfulness. Whether it's fear of the unknown or everyday anxieties, this sermon offers insights for anyone looking to find peace and courage through their faith.

item.title: Coping with Our Fears - Sunday Morning Service - Feb 11th, 2024
item.description:
Explore the powerful theme of 'Double Trouble' in this enlightening sermon, as we delve into biblical stories of curses and blessings to uncover the dangers of duplicity in faith. Discover how ancient narratives and modern-day distractions reveal the importance of a single-minded devotion to God. Learn practical steps to avoid the pitfalls of being double-hearted, double-minded, and double-tongued, and how to embrace a life of focused faithfulness. Join us on a journey from the perils of divided loyalty to the peace of unwavering commitment to what is right and true.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Coping With Our Fears - Sunday Evening Service - Feb 4th, 2024
item.description:
Explore the depths of faith and fear with our enlightening sermon "Coping With Our Fears." Delve into how understanding God's promises, presence, and purposes provides us with the strength to face our darkest fears. From personal stories across the globe to the wisdom of Psalms and the insightful experiments of Curt Paul Richter, this sermon offers hope and guidance for navigating the valleys of life. Discover how to anchor your soul in hope and emerge fearless, no matter the challenges. Join us on this transformative journey to overcoming fear with faith.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

Delve into how understanding God's promises, presence, and purposes provides us with the strength to face our darkest fears. From personal stories across the globe to the wisdom of Psalms and the insightful experiments of Curt Paul Richter, this sermon offers hope and guidance for navigating the valleys of life. Discover how to anchor your soul in hope and emerge fearless, no matter the challenges. Join us on this transformative journey to overcoming fear with faith.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: How to Incline My Heart to Obey God Forever - Sunday Morning Service - Feb 4th, 2024
item.description:
Discover the transformative journey of inclining your heart to obey God forever in our latest sermon. Drawing inspiration from Psalm 119:112-116, we explore the profound shift from performing religious duties to embodying a spirit of true obedience and devotion. Learn how to cultivate a deep-seated aversion to spiritual instability, find solace and protection in the Lord, and place unwavering hope in His Word.
Join us as we navigate through the three key inclinations that can transform your relationship with God: hating all forms of instability, hiding in the Lord during times of trouble, and hoping in God's Word as the ultimate source of truth and salvation. This sermon is not just about what we do but about who we are inclined to be in the Spirit.
Subscribe for more uplifting messages and join us in exploring the depths of faith, hope, and love in our spiritual walk with God.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.description:
Explore the essence of spiritual purity in 'What We Must Remember Part 3: Remember Purity'. Delve into a thought-provoking journey through Revelation 3:1-6 and other key Scriptures, discovering how to maintain purity in a challenging world. Laugh, reflect, and grow with an unforgettable illustration about three boys and their dads. Join us in understanding how purity isn't just about the flesh but encompasses our whole being, as we seek to live worthy lives before God.

item.title: What We Must Remember Part 2: We Must Remember Love - Sunday Evening - Jan 14th, 2024
item.description:
Rediscover the essence of love with 'What We Must Remember Part 2: We Must Remember Love'. This sermon weaves together psychological insights and Biblical wisdom, offering a unique perspective on reigniting the flame of love in our relationships with God and each other. Delve into the practical and spiritual steps of remembering, repenting, and repeating our first acts of love, guided by poignant scriptures and real-life applications. Join us in this heartfelt exploration of love's enduring power and our journey to rekindle it in our lives.

item.title: Why We Can Not Help Everyone - Part 2 - Sunday Morning Service - Jan 14th, 2024
item.description:
Dive into the depths of human constraints in 'Why We Can Not Help Everyone - Part 2'. This thought-provoking sermon ventures beyond conventional understanding, focusing on the limitations not just within us, but also in those we strive to assist. Harnessing a blend of biblical narratives, modern analogies, and a touch of humor, this message sheds light on the intricate challenges of aiding others while embracing our own limitations. Engage in this enlightening exploration that intertwines spiritual insights with everyday realities, fostering a deeper comprehension of our roles in others' lives according to the principles of Luke 22 and other scriptures. Witness a unique perspective on service, patience, and understanding in our spiritual walk.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: When The World Said Christians Were Bad - Sunday Morning - Dec 3rd, 2023
item.description:
Explore the trials and tribulations faced by Christians throughout history and in the modern world in this enlightening sermon. Drawing on scripture and historical references, we delve into the accusations and misconceptions that have been leveled against Christians, from the early days of the faith to the present. Discover how Christianity has thrived despite opposition and consider how you can stand firm in your faith amidst worldly challenges. Join us for this thought-provoking journey through history and faith.

item.title: "But If Not..." Hallelujah Anyway - Sunday Evening - Nov 19th, 2023
item.description:

item.title: Meals with Jesus - Sunday Evening - Oct 22nd, 2023
item.description:
Discover the profound significance of meals in the Bible in our latest sermon, "Meals with Jesus". Journey through ten biblical stories of meals involving Jesus, and uncover their implications for Christian fellowship, communion, and our relationship with God. From the multiplication of wine at a wedding to the final celebratory meal in Revelation, each meal carries a miraculous message or miracle. Join us as we delve into these stories and explore how they speak to different places within us.

item.title: If a man dies, shall he live again? - Sunday Morning - Oct 15th, 2023
item.description:
Embark on a spiritual journey as we grapple with the profound question, "If a man dies, shall he live again?", the fifth in the series of "Questions that Deserve an Answer". This sermon takes you on a deep dive into the Book of Job to the New Testament. We'll explore the intricate tapestry of life, death, and what comes after, guided by the divine wisdom of God's creation, conclusion, and considerations. This sermon is an essential watch for those seeking solace, comprehension, and hope amidst the inevitability of mortality.

item.title: Preparation for Organizational Division - Sunday Evening - Sept 17th, 2023
item.description:
Dive into part three of this series, "Thinking Inside The Box" where we explore the biblical teachings on handling church divisions. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking guidance on maintaining unity and peace within their church community. It's packed with wisdom from Acts 20:17-38, providing practical steps to prevent division and promote harmony. Discover how to remain unmoved by plots, panic, pain, perusals, phonies, philosophies, and prosperity. Join us as we learn to stand firm in our faith and commitment to the church, just as Jesus did.

Dive into part two of this series, "Preparation for Theological Friction," where we explore the challenges of church division and the importance of unity. Discover the three principles leaders should follow when friction arises, focusing on the precedence of experience, exegesis, and expediency. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to understand the complexities of maintaining unity within the church and preparing for theological friction.
Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Jesus Is Worthy to Receive Tithes - Sunday Morning - Sep 10th, 2023
item.description:
Explore the historical and theological perspectives of tithing from the Patriarchal Age to the Christian Age, and discover why Jesus, being of the Order of Melchizedek, is worthy to receive tithes. This sermon is a treasure trove of biblical references, historical facts, and thought-provoking insights that will enrich your understanding of giving in the Christian faith.

item.title: Jesus Taught the Kingdom Is Worth It All - Sunday Morning - Aug 27th, 2023
item.description:
Explore the difference between debt and investment, both in our worldly lives and in our spiritual journey. Drawing from personal anecdotes and humor, we delve into the true value of the Kingdom of God and why it's worth investing everything we have. We also examine various biblical passages to understand the pitfalls of giving with the wrong intentions.
This sermon is a call to reflect on our spiritual investments and to prioritize the Kingdom of God above all else. Tune in and let's grow in faith together. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more inspiring messages.
813-685-0750 Creekside Church of Christ 3949 Lithia Pinecrest Rd, Valrico, FL 33596 https://creekside.life

item.title: Paths to Overcoming Crazy - Aug 20th, 2023
item.description:

We'll learn how to strengthen our minds and spirits through Acknowledgment, Attempting, Altering, and Avoidance. This is a journey of faith, resilience, and self-discovery that will inspire and empower you. Come, let's grow together.

item.description:

item.title: Where They Found Young Jesus - Sunday Morning - August 5th, 2023
item.description:
Explore the life of young Jesus with us. This sermon delves into the scriptures of Luke 2:39-52, revealing where Jesus was found and how he grew in wisdom and stature. Discover the importance of the House of God, the role of teachers, and the power of studying scripture. This sermon is a must-watch for anyone seeking to deepen their understanding of Jesus' early life and the lessons we can learn from it.
